title: 金鯱賞の後に・再起、躍進

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward the race, Silence Suzuka is filled with a
rare excitement, and raves about the beautiful
scenery she witnessed during the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many Umamusume are inspired by this race, the
flames in their hearts stoked to a blazing roar.
